findStrings.find: // Typically, we should avoid snapshots... but here, a snapshot is kind of exactly what we need
produces the correct data shape given a response with all asset types in it

element.setting: Jest.AIReviewPage.shows the default view when there are holdings
Jest.AIReview.renders the review status and updated at date
Jest.DownloadEdits.calls onclick handler on button click - with uploaded original asset

configuration.name: AIReviewPage.shows the default view when there are holdings
AIReview.renders the review status and updated at date
AIReview.renders the review status and updated at date
AIReview.renders the review status and updated at date
DownloadEdits.calls onclick handler on button click - with uploaded original asset
